feedback.details: Lists use '- ' bullet format (deployment.md:220-275) instead of required 4-space indentation. While nested items use 4-space indentation (deployment.md:242-243), parent list items must also follow 4-space indentation per contract. H1-H3 hierarchy correct (H1 at line 1, H2 at lines 5, 217, etc.). Fenced code blocks with language identifiers present (hcl, mermaid).

overall_summary: Sprint 6 architecture files are substantially complete with comprehensive technical specifications. deployment.md contains a production-ready Nomad HCL job with SHA256 image hash, resource constraints (2000 MHz CPU, 4096 MB memory), Consul service registration with 10s health checks, and Vault agent templating. edge-functions/c2-container.md documents the X-API-Key header validation, HS256 JWT extraction, secret/data/edge/api Vault path, and 401/403 error JSON structures with rate limiting (100 req/min). Horizontal scaling (count=3, 80% CPU threshold, round-robin) and connection pooling (max_connections=100, timeout=30s) are complete. All PRD alignments cite exact section numbers. The only significant gap is Markdown Syntax and Structure (6.0/10, threshold 9.0): lists use '- ' bullet format instead of the required 4-space indentation, violating the contract's structural requirements.
